children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established to carry out the provisions of this subchapter the Emergency Food and Shelter Program National Board. The Administrator of the Federal Emergency Management Agency shall constitute the National Board in accordance with subsection (b) in administering the program under this subchapter.
The National Council of Churches of Christ in the U.S.A.
The Council of Jewish Federations, Inc.

children.heading: Chairperson
children.label: c Chairperson
children.text: The Director shall be the Chairperson of the National Board.

children.heading: Other activities
children.label: d Other activities
children.text: Except as otherwise specifically provided in this subchapter, the National Board shall establish its own procedures and policies for the conduct of its affairs.

children.heading: Transfers from previous national board
children.label: e Transfers from previous national board

children.text: the national board constituted under the emergency food and shelter program established pursuant to or shall cease to exist; andsection 101(g) of Public Law 99–500Public Law 99–591
the personnel, property, records, and undistributed program funds of such national board shall be transferred to the National Board.
